name: DatamodelLM
description: AI-assisted data modeling with visual entity-relationship diagrams
author: Nimbalyst

marketplace.changelog:
1.0.2: Share selected model elements with AI and reopen shared documents more reliably.
1.0.1: Collaborative editing support, light-theme readability fixes, and more reliable external file edits.
marketplace.tagline: Visual database schema design with Prisma syntax
marketplace.longDescription: Design database schemas visually as entity-relationship diagrams backed by real Prisma syntax. Drag entities around the canvas, define fields and relations, and switch to source mode to edit the Prisma schema directly. The AI can generate schemas from descriptions or modify existing ones.
highlights: Visual ERD canvas backed by real Prisma schema files
AI generates and modifies database schemas from descriptions
Embed data models inline in markdown documents
Bidirectional editing between visual and source modes

screenshots.alt: Visual entity-relationship diagram with User, Post, Comment, Tag, and Category models

claudePlugin.description: Provides /datamodel command for creating Prisma-based data models with full schema syntax guidance

commands.name: datamodel
commands.description: Create or modify Prisma-based data models
